name_en: Mini 🔮 CHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 Black mixed with suede 🀄️ New version uses gold plating technology 🤩 25P Latest 31Bag is already cute to hold, until meeting the phone bag, really a super cute little one! Not suitable for being too full, about a phone + lipstick + car keys or compact powder 🖤 Switch carrying methods freely, hand-held is also too cute! Really love the 31 series. Size: 21*17*3.5cm
